message:
feat(crash): add crash listing and wa doctor integration

Expose crash bundle discovery via list_crash_bundles() and
latest_crash_bundle(), then wire the most recent crash into the
`wa doctor` output as a "Crash History" diagnostic section.

- CrashBundleSummary struct holds path + parsed manifest/report
- list_crash_bundles scans wa_crash_* dirs, parses JSON, sorts newest-first
- latest_crash_bundle convenience wrapper for single-bundle lookup
- wa doctor shows [WARN] with crash message + location when bundles exist
- wa doctor shows [OK] "No crash bundles found" when clean
- 8 listing tests covering empty/nonexistent dirs, ordering, limits, filtering

Closes wa-upg.13.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
